# Haba Field

**Summary**: A field in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-toma|Toma, 2011]] applied the hybrid approach to a 3D seismic data set from Haba Field.

## Key Findings From This Location
